headline: Morgan Stanley Sees More Upside in Dover (DOV) Shares
summary: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) is included among the Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 4, Morgan Stanley analyst Christopher Snyder increased his price recommendation for Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) to $230 from $210. He reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The move came after a strong start to the year for […]
